overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character walking through a futuristic corporate space station interior. The character moves through clean white corridors and a lounge area with red carpeting before entering a restricted staff area.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate corridor with exterior viewing windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a futuristic white corridor toward a lounge area

notable_agents.action: figure in red outfit walking ahead in the corridor
security guard standing with arms crossed near the circular doorway

entered.detail: large window showing exterior space view with metallic frames
circular metallic doorway with mechanical hinges and signage above
rectangular illuminated panels embedded in the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow, brightly lit corridor with glass windows on the left showing the exterior. A circular doorway structure labeled 'DECKPIT MODEL' is visible on the right. Two NPCs are seen ahead - one walking in the distance and a guard standing near the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate lounge with red carpet and company branding

events.description: exits the narrow corridor and enters the open lounge area with red carpeting

agents.ego_description: walking across the red carpeted lounge area toward the staff entrance

notable_agents.action: security guard in tactical gear standing with arms crossed near the reception desk

entered.detail: bright red carpet covering the floor of the lounge area
large red wall with illuminated 'TAIYO ASTRONEERING' company logo
modern white curved sofas and seating pods
illuminated sign reading 'LOUNGE' above the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious lounge with red carpeting and white modern furniture. A large 'TAIYO ASTRONEERING' logo dominates the back wall. The character passes a security guard standing near a reception desk on the right while heading toward a 'STAFF ONLY' doorway.

events.description: approaches and enters the Staff Only doorway as it opens

agents.ego_description: approaching the staff only door and entering the restricted area

entered.detail: large metallic sliding door with 'STAFF ONLY' signage above

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the remaining lounge space toward a restricted doorway marked 'STAFF ONLY'. The automatic door slides open as the character approaches, revealing a white interior corridor beyond. The character enters the doorway, leaving the lounge area behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, narrow corridor into a luxurious corporate lounge and finally into a restricted staff area. It begins by tracking the character down a brightly lit hallway past glass windows and a circular doorway labeled Deckpit Model, where a guard stands watch. As the character moves forward, the space opens up into a spacious lounge featuring red carpeting, modern white furniture, and a large Taiyo Astroneering logo on the back wall. The camera then passes a security guard at a reception desk while heading across the open floor toward a restricted entrance. Finally, the scene shifts as an automatic door marked Staff Only slides open, allowing the character to leave the lounge and enter a clean white interior corridor.
